ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the order was placed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated from the order */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer rating for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was delivered */,
  "delivery_city" TEXT /* City where the order was delivered */,
  "delivery_state" TEXT /* State where the order was delivered */,
  "delivery_region" TEXT /* Region where the order was delivered */,
  "delivery_pincode" TEXT /* Pincode where the order was delivered */,
  "order_placed_through" TEXT /* Platform through which the order was placed (e.g., mobile, web, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Oil & Masala) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., Masalas) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the order */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order to which the discount applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the profit */,
  "profit_amount" REAL /* Total profit made from the order */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profits_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being rated */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the customer */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the analytics data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographics record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the demographics data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_demographics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
